TEXT.English: Units can leave friendly borders to attack enemy units skirting the edges. Even with this options, units will turn back after going three tiles from a friendly border.
TEXT.French: Les Unitรฉs peuvent quitter l'intรฉrieur des frontiรจres pour attaque des unitรฉs ennemies proches. Mรชme avec cette option, les unitรฉs reviendrons dans le territoire au bout de trois cases.

TEXT.English: Units can leave their current city, to shore up defenses in weaker or threatened cities. A unit will never leave a city if it the only defender.

TEXT.English: Select grouping options for the production list on the Customizable Domestic Advisor screen:[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]None[COLOR_REVERT] - No special grouping.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]Icons[COLOR_REVERT] - Production items prefaced by icons denoting the type of item which keeps them grouped together when sorting.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]Colors[COLOR_REVERT] - Production items colored based on the type of item.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]Both[COLOR_REVERT] - Production items prefaced by icons and colored based on the type of item.
TEXT.French: Sรฉlectionne les options de regroupement pour la liste de production de l'รฉcran du Conseiller 'CDA':[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]Aucun[COLOR_REVERT] - Pas de regroupement.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]Icรดnes[COLOR_REVERT] - Les noms des productions sont prรฉcรฉdรฉs d'icรดnes symbolisant leur type, permettant ainsi un tri par type de production.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]Couleurs[COLOR_REVERT] - Les productions sont mis en valeur par des couleurs symbolisant le type de production.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]Les deux[COLOR_REVERT] - Les Productions sont prรฉcรฉdรฉs d'icรดnes de type, et sont mis en valeurs par des couleurs spรฉcifiquement pour fonction du type de production.
TEXT.German: Bestimmt die Gruppierungseinstellungen fรผr die Spalte "Produktion" im "Customizable Domestic Advisor" (CDA):[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]Keine[COLOR_REVERT] - Keine besondere Gruppierung[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]Symbole[COLOR_REVERT] - Produzierte Objekte erhalten entsprechend ihrer Art vorangestellte Symbole, wobei die Gruppierung auch nach einer Sortierung erhalten bleibt[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]Farben[COLOR_REVERT] - Produzierte Objekte werden entsprechend ihrer Art eingefรคrbt[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]Beides[COLOR_REVERT] - Produzierte Objekte erhalten entsprechend ihrer Art vorangestellte Symbole und werden gleichzeitig eingefรคrbt
TEXT.Italian: [BOLD]Seleziona un'[COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]opzione di visualizzazione personalizzata[COLOR_REVERT] per lo schermo della lista cittร :[NEWLINE][NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]Nessuna[COLOR_REVERT] - Nessuna visualizzazione particolare[NEWLINE][NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]Icone[COLOR_REVERT] - Gli oggetti in produzione vengono preceduti da icone che li mantengono raggruppati quando si ordina per questo parametro[NEWLINE][NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]Colori[COLOR_REVERT] - Il nome degli oggetti in produzione viene colorato in base al tipo di oggetto.[NEWLINE][NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]Entrambi[COLOR_REVERT] - Il nome degli oggetti in produzione viene colorato in base al tipo dell'oggetto e preceduto da un'icona[\BOLD]

TEXT.English: Plot distance between capitals that qualifies another civ as a local neighbour to the emerging civ. The other civ must have a city on the same landmass as the emerging civ for it to be considered a neighbour. Civs emerging from barbarians adapt to their local neighbours in many different ways, e.g. tech level. A low value will make each such civ generation more generic. A high value can impact performance slightly, especially on large maps. The value set here is the value used for a 'Duel' world size. The value is multiplied by 15 on a 'Gigantic' world sized map.

TEXT.English: New World policy for the emergence of civs from barbarian cities.1: A minor civ in the New World needs contact with a major civ to become a major civ, each contact increase the odds for it.2: Like 1, but a major civ must have units on the landmass for major civs to emerge there.3: Barbarian cities can form civs in the New World when a major civ have units on the landmass.4: Like 3, but the requirement is cities instead of units.
TEXT.French: Politique du Nouveau Monde pour l'รฉmergence des civilisations ร partir des villes barbares.1 : Une civilisation mineure doit รฉtablir un contact avec une civilisation majeure pour devenir majeure, chaque contact augmente ses chances.2 : Comme 1, mais une civ majeure doit avoir des unitรฉs sur la masse continentale.3 : Les villes barbares peuvent former des civilisations quand une civ majeure a des unitรฉs sur la masse continentale.4 : Comme 3, mais la condition concerne les villes, pas les unitรฉs.
TEXT.Italian: [BOLD][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]Scegli opzione[COLOR_REVERT] che regola l'emergere di civiltร dalle cittร barbare[NEWLINE][NEWLINE]1 - Una civiltร minore ha bisogno di un [COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]contatto con una civiltร maggiore[COLOR_REVERT] per diventare una civiltร maggiore a sua volta, ogni contatto aumenta le probabilitร che ciรฒ accada[NEWLINE][NEWLINE]2 - Come l'opzione 1, ma una civiltร maggiore deve [COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]avere unitร su uno specifico territorio[COLOR_REVERT] affinchรฉ altre civiltร maggiori emergano lรฌ[NEWLINE][NEWLINE]3 - Le cittร barbare possono formare [COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]nuove civiltร [COLOR_REVERT] quando una [COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]civiltร principale ha unitร sul territorio[COLOR_REVERT][NEWLINE][NEWLINE]4 - Come l'opzione 3, ma sono richieste [COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]cittร invece che unitร [COLOR_REVERT][\BOLD]

TEXT.English: Even without this option enabled, XP from combat is partially determined by victory chance. However, enabling this "Dynamic+ XP" game option will significantly magnify the effect, making it slower to train high-level units through low-risk combat (Minimum XP lowered to 0.01 from 1), but increasing further the XP gained by winning at lower odds (Maximum XP uncapped from 10). Additionally, many combat-adjacent actions such as pillaging, bombardment, etc. will give small amounts of XP.
TEXT.French: Mรชme sans cette option activรฉe, l'XP gagnรฉe lors des combats est partiellement dรฉterminรฉe par les chances de victoire. De plus, de nombreuses actions liรฉes au combat, comme le pillage, le bombardement, etc., accorderont de petites quantitรฉs d'XP.

TEXT.French: Lorsque activรฉ, affiche la diffรฉrence de score entre ce tour et le tour prรฉcรฉdent.
TEXT.German: Zeigt die Verรคnderung der Wertung einer Zivilisation seit der letzten Runde an
TEXT.Italian: [BOLD]Nel [COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]pannello punteggio[COLOR_REVERT] viene mostrata la [COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]variazione del punteggio[COLOR_REVERT] della altre civiltร rispetto al turno precedente[\BOLD]
TEXT.Spanish: Cuando se activa, muestra el cambio en la puntuaciรณn desde el รบltimo turno.
TEXT.Russian: รรฎรฃรคร รขรชรซรพรทรฅรญ, รฏรฎรชร รงรปรขร รฅรฒ รจรงรฌรฅรญรฅรญรจรฅ รข รฑรทรฅรฒรฅ รฑ รฏรฐรฅรครปรครณรนรฅรฃรฎ รตรฎรคร

TEXT.French: Delta de Score

TEXT.English: Determines how civilizations are labeled on the scoreboard.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]Leader[COLOR_REVERT] - Name of the leader or player (Victoria or EmperorFool).[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]Civilization[COLOR_REVERT] - Name of the civilization (England).[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]Description[COLOR_REVERT] - Descriptive name of the civilization (English Empire).
TEXT.French: Dรฉtermine comment les civilisations sont affichรฉes sur le panneau des scores.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]Leader[COLOR_REVERT] - Nom du leader ou du Joueur (Victoria or EmperorFool).[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]Civilisation[COLOR_REVERT] - Nom de la civilisation (England).[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]Description[COLOR_REVERT] - Nome Descriptif de la civilisation (English Empire).
TEXT.German: Bestimmt den Namen, mit dem Zivilisationen in der Punkteanzeige angezeigt werden:[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]Oberhaupt[COLOR_REVERT] - Name des Oberhaupts oder Spielers (Victoria oder EmperorFool)[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]Zivilisation (Ziv)[COLOR_REVERT] - Name der Zivilisation (England)[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]Ziv-Beschreibung[COLOR_REVERT] - Beschreibender Name der Zivilisation (Reich der Englรคnder)
TEXT.Italian: [BOLD]Determina con che nome le civiltร vengono identificate nel pannello punteggio[NEWLINE][NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]Leader[COLOR_REVERT] - Nome del leader o del giocatore (Cleopatra o qualsiasi nome inserito)[NEWLINE][NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]Civiltร [COLOR_REVERT] - Nome della civiltร (Inghilterra)[NEWLINE][NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]Descrizione[COLOR_REVERT] - Nome descrittivo della civiltร (Impero Inglese)[\BOLD]
TEXT.Spanish: Determina cรณmo son etiquetadas las civilizaciones en el panel de clasificaciรณn.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]Lรญder[COLOR_REVERT] - Nombre del lรญder o jugador (Victoria o EmperorFool).[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]Civilizaciรณn[COLOR_REVERT] - Nombre de la civilizaciรณn (Inglaterra).[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]Descripciรณn[COLOR_REVERT] - Nombre descriptivo de la civilizaciรณn (Imperio Inglรฉs).
TEXT.Russian: รรฏรฐรฅรครฅรซรฟรฅรฒ รชร รช รถรจรขรจรซรจรงร รถรจรจ รฎรฒรฌรฅรทร รพรฒรฑรฟ รข รฒร รกรซรจรถรฅ.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]รรจรครฅรฐ[COLOR_REVERT] - รจรฌรฟ รซรจรครฅรฐร รจรซรจ รจรฃรฐรฎรชร (รรจรชรฒรฎรฐรจรฟ รจรซรจ รรณรฐร รชรรฌรฏรฅรฐร รฒรฎรฐ).[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]รรจรขรจรซรจรงร รถรจรฟ[COLOR_REVERT] - รร รงรขร รญรจรฅ รถรจรขรจรซรจรงร รถรจรจ (รรญรฃรซรจรฟ).[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]รรฏรจรฑร รญรจรฅ[COLOR_REVERT] - รฎรฏรจรฑร รญรจรฅ รจรฌรฅรญรจ รถรจรขรจรซรจรงร รถรจรจ (รรญรฃรซรจรฉรฑรชร รฟ รจรฌรฏรฅรฐรจรฟ).
TEXT.Polish: Okreœla sposób oznaczania cywilizacji na tablicy wyników.[NEWLINE][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT][ICON_BULLET]Przywódca[COLOR_REVERT] - Imiê przywódcy lub gracza (Victoria lub EmperorFool).[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]Cywilizacja[COLOR_REVERT] - Nazwa cywilizacji (Anglia).[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]Opis[COLOR_REVERT] - Opisowa nazwa cywilizacji (Imperium Angielskie).

TEXT.French: Dirigeant|Civilisation|Description de la Civ|Dirigeant / Civ|Description Dirigeant / Civ

TEXT.Spanish: Mostrar nombre

TEXT.English: This determines the order in which the score columns appear.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]W[COLOR_REVERT] - You are at war or have a peace treaty with the civ.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]S[COLOR_REVERT] - The civ's score.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]Z[COLOR_REVERT] - The change in the civ's score since previous turn.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]K[COLOR_REVERT] - The civ's rank based on their score.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]Q[COLOR_REVERT] - The number of cities the civ owns.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]V[COLOR_REVERT] - The civ has at least one vassal.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]I[COLOR_REVERT] - The civ's player ID number.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]C[COLOR_REVERT] - The civ's/leader's/player's name.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]?[COLOR_REVERT] - You have not yet met the civ.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]E[COLOR_REVERT] - You have a positive espionage point ratio against the civ.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]P[COLOR_REVERT] - The civ's power ratio compared to you.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]T[COLOR_REVERT] - The tech the civ is researching (vassals, teammates and espionage).[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]U[COLOR_REVERT] - The number of research turns left.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]N[COLOR_REVERT] - The civ is connected to your trade network.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]B[COLOR_REVERT] - You have an open borders agreement with the civ.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]D[COLOR_REVERT] - You have a defensive pact with the civ.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]R[COLOR_REVERT] - The civ's state religion.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]A[COLOR_REVERT] - The civ's attitude toward you.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]H[COLOR_REVERT] - You are the civ's worst enemy.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]F[COLOR_REVERT] - The civ refuses to talk to you.[DLL=1][NEWLINE][DLLMSG][/DLL][NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]M[COLOR_REVERT] - The civ is mobilizing for war (WHEOOH).[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]*[COLOR_REVERT] - This civ is waiting for you to finish your turn in multiplayer.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]L[COLOR_REVERT] - Civ's network stats (ping).[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]O[COLOR_REVERT] - The network player is out-of-sync.[NEWLINE][NEWLINE]You can place a number (positive or negative) between column codes to override the default spacing.
TEXT.French: Ceci dรฉtermine l'ordre dans lequel les colonnes apparaissent.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]W[COLOR_REVERT] - Vous รชtes en guerre contre cette civilisation.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]S[COLOR_REVERT] - Score de la civilisation.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]Z[COLOR_REVERT] - Diffรฉrence de score depuis le tour prรฉcรฉdent.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]K[COLOR_REVERT] - Rang de la civilisation, basรฉ sur son score.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]Q[COLOR_REVERT] - Le nombre de Villes.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]V[COLOR_REVERT] - La civ a au moins un vassal.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]I[COLOR_REVERT] - l'ID de la civilisation.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]C[COLOR_REVERT] - Nom de la civilisation et/ou du dirigeant.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]?[COLOR_REVERT] - Si Vous n'avez pas encore rencontrรฉ cette civilisation.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]E[COLOR_REVERT] - Si Votre pro-rata d'espionnage avec cette civilisation est bon.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]P[COLOR_REVERT] - Pro-rata du pouvoir de cette civilisation comparรฉ ร vous.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]T[COLOR_REVERT] - La technologie que la civilisation recherche (vassaux, รฉquipe et espionnage).[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]U[COLOR_REVERT] - Le nombre de tours qui restent pour la recherche.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]N[COLOR_REVERT] - Si Cette civilisation est connectรฉe ร votre rรฉseau de commerce.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]B[COLOR_REVERT] - Si Vous avez une accord de frontiรจres ouvertes avec cette civilisation.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]D[COLOR_REVERT] - Si Vous avez un pacte dรฉfensif avec cette civilisation.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]R[COLOR_REVERT] - La religion nationale de cette civilisation.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]A[COLOR_REVERT] - L'attitude de cette civilisation envers vous.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]H[COLOR_REVERT] - Si vous รชtes le Pire Ennemi de cette civ.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]F[COLOR_REVERT] - Si le leader refuse de vous parler.[DLL=1][NEWLINE][DLLMSG][/DLL][NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]M[COLOR_REVERT] - Si la civ. se mobilise pour la Guerre (WHEOOH).[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]*[COLOR_REVERT] - Vous attendez que cette civilisation finisse son tour.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]L[COLOR_REVERT] - Statistique de Rรฉseau (ping).[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]O[COLOR_REVERT] - Le joueur est out-of-sync.[NEWLINE][NEWLINE]Vous pouvez placer un nombre (positif ou nรฉgatif) entre les codes de colonne pour dรฉfinir un espacement personnalisรฉ.
TEXT.German: Bestimmt die Reihenfolge, in der die Spalten der Punkteanzeige angeordnet werden:[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]W[COLOR_REVERT] - Kriegszustand oder Friedensvertrag mit einer Zivilisation[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]S[COLOR_REVERT] - Wertung einer Zivilisation[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]Z[COLOR_REVERT] - Verรคnderung der Wertung einer Zivilisation seit der letzten Runde[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]K[COLOR_REVERT] - Rang einer Zivilisation basierend auf ihrer Wertung[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]Q[COLOR_REVERT] - Anzahl der Stรคdte, รผber die eine Zivilisation verfรผgt[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]V[COLOR_REVERT] - Eine Zivilisation hat mindestens einen Vasallen[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]I[COLOR_REVERT] - Spieler-ID-Nummer einer Zivilisation[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]C[COLOR_REVERT] - Name einer Zivilisation/eines Oberhaupts/eines Spielers[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]?[COLOR_REVERT] - Zivilisation noch nicht kontaktiert[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]E[COLOR_REVERT] - Gutes Spionagepunktverhรคltnis gegenรผber einer Zivilisation[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]P[COLOR_REVERT] - Machtverhรคltnis zwischen der eigenen und einer gegnerischen Zivilisation[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]T[COLOR_REVERT] - Derzeitiges Forschungsprojekt einer Zivilisation (bei Vasallen, Verbรผndeten und durch Spionage erlangt)[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]U[COLOR_REVERT] - Anzahl verbleibender Runden bis zur Erforschung[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]N[COLOR_REVERT] - Handelsverbindungen mit einer Zivilisation[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]B[COLOR_REVERT] - Offene Grenzen mit einer Zivilisation[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]D[COLOR_REVERT] - Verteidigungsbรผndnis mit einer Zivilisation[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]R[COLOR_REVERT] - Staatsreligion einer Zivilisation[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]A[COLOR_REVERT] - Einstellung einer Zivilisation gegenรผber der eigenen[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]H[COLOR_REVERT] - Erzfeind der eigenen Zivilisation[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]F[COLOR_REVERT] - Gesprรคchsverweigerung einer Zivilisation[DLL=1][NEWLINE][DLLMSG][/DLL][NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]M[COLOR_REVERT] - Kriegsvorbereitungen einer Zivilisation[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]*[COLOR_REVERT] - Warten auf den Zug einer Zivilisation (im Multiplayer)[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]L[COLOR_REVERT] - Netzwerkstatistik einer Zivilisation (Ping)[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]O[COLOR_REVERT] - Verbundener Spieler ist "out-of-sync"[NEWLINE][NEWLINE]Zwischen den Codes fรผr die Spalten kรถnnen (positive oder negative) Zahlen gesetzt werden, die den eingestellten Standardabstand auรer Kraft setzen.
TEXT.Italian: [BOLD]Determina l'ordine in base al quale vengono visualizzate le colonne del pannello punteggio:[NEWLINE][NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]W[COLOR_REVERT] - Il giocatore รจ in guerra o ha un trattato di pace con una civiltร [NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]S[COLOR_REVERT] - Punteggio della civiltร [NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]Z[COLOR_REVERT] - Variazione del punteggio rispetto al turno precedente[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]K[COLOR_REVERT] - Posizione della civiltร nella classifica in base al punteggio[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]Q[COLOR_REVERT] - Numero di cittร possedute dalla civiltร [NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]V[COLOR_REVERT] - Icona di una stella argentata se la civiltร ha dei vassalli[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]I[COLOR_REVERT] - Numero di identificazione della civiltร del giocatore[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]C[COLOR_REVERT] - Nome della civiltร o del leader[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]?[COLOR_REVERT] - Civiltร non ancora incontrate (nessun contatto)[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]E[COLOR_REVERT] - Rapporto spionaggio positivo contro una civiltร [NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]P[COLOR_REVERT] - Rapporto di forza della civiltร rispetto a quella del giocatore (o viceversa)[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]T[COLOR_REVERT] - Tecnologia che la civiltร sta ricercando (vassalli, alleati o mediante Spionaggio);[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]U[COLOR_REVERT] - Numero di turni di ricerca rimasti alla civiltร per scoprire la tecnologia che sta ricercando[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]N[COLOR_REVERT] - Civiltร connessa alla tua rete commerciale[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]B[COLOR_REVERT] - Accordo di confini aperto con la civiltร [NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]D[COLOR_REVERT] - Patto Difensivo con la civiltร [NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]R[COLOR_REVERT] - Religione di stato della civiltร [NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]A[COLOR_REVERT] - Atteggiamento della civiltร nei confronti del giocatore[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]H[COLOR_REVERT] - Indica se il giocatore รจ il peggior nemico di una civiltร [NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]F[COLOR_REVERT] - Il leader della civiltร rifiuta di parlare al giocatore[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]M[COLOR_REVERT] - La civiltร si sta mobilitando per la guerra;[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]*[COLOR_REVERT] - La civiltร attende che il giocatore finisca il suo turno[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]L[COLOR_REVERT] - Ping di connessione della civiltร [NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]O[COLOR_REVERT] - La rete del giocatore non รจ sincronizzata[NEWLINE][NEWLINE]ร possibile inserire un numero (positivo o negativo) tra i codici di colonna per [COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]sovrascrivere la spaziatura predefinita[COLOR_REVERT][\BOLD]
TEXT.Spanish: Determina el orden en que se muestran las columnas de la tabla:[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]W[COLOR_REVERT] - En guerra o en paz con la civilizaciรณn.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]S[COLOR_REVERT] - La puntuaciรณn de la civilizaciรณn.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]Z[COLOR_REVERT] - El cambio en la puntuaciรณn desde el รบltimo turno.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]K[COLOR_REVERT] - La posiciรณn de la civilizaciรณn en base a su puntuacion.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]Q[COLOR_REVERT] - El nรบmero de ciudades que la civilizaciรณn posee.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]V[COLOR_REVERT] - La civilizaciรณn tiene al menos un vasallo.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]I[COLOR_REVERT] - El ID del jugador.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]C[COLOR_REVERT] - El nombre del jugador/lรญder/civilizaciรณn.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]?[COLOR_REVERT] - Aรบn no has encontrado a esta civilizaciรณn.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]E[COLOR_REVERT] - Tienes un balance positivo en puntos de espionaje sobre esta civilizaciรณn.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]P[COLOR_REVERT] - El poder militar de la civilizaciรณn comparado contigo.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]T[COLOR_REVERT] - La tecnologรญa que la civilizaciรณn estรก investigando (vasallos, compaรฑeros y espionaje).[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]U[COLOR_REVERT] - El numero de turnos restantes para obtener la tecnologรญa.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]N[COLOR_REVERT] - La civilizaciรณn estรก conectada a tu red comercial.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]B[COLOR_REVERT] - Tienes un pacto de apertura de fronteras con la civilizaciรณn.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]D[COLOR_REVERT] - Tienes un Acuerdo de protecciรณn con la civilizaciรณn.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]R[COLOR_REVERT] - La religiรณn oficial de la civilizaciรณn.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]A[COLOR_REVERT] - La actitud de la civilizaciรณn hacia ti.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]H[COLOR_REVERT] - Eres el peor enemigo de la civilizaciรณn.[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]F[COLOR_REVERT] - La civilizaciรณn se niega a hablar contigo.[DLL=1][NEWLINE][DLLMSG][/DLL][NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]M[COLOR_REVERT] - TEXT.English: Enter the user defined naming convention (see help file for further information). Names canbe built from plain text and format codes that appear between matching carets (^).[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET]e.g."^cv^ ^ut^ from ^ct^" --> "American Archer from Boston"[NEWLINE][BOLD]General Codes[\BOLD][NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]civ4[COLOR_REVERT]- Use built-in Civ4 names[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]rd[COLOR_REVERT] - Random name[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]rc[COLOR_REVERT]- Random civ-related name[NEWLINE][BOLD]Unit Info Codes[\BOLD][NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]ct[COLOR_REVERT]- City where unit was built (e.g. Boston)[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]cv[COLOR_REVERT]- Civilization that built the unit in adjective form (e.g. American)[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]ut[COLOR_REVERT]- Unit type (e.g. Archer)[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]cb[COLOR_REVERT] - Combat type(e.g.Melee)[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]dm[COLOR_REVERT] - Domain type (e.g. Water)[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]ld[COLOR_REVERT]- Leader that built the unit (e.g. Roosevelt)[NEWLINE][BOLD]Counting Codes[\BOLD][NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]cnt[f][COLOR_REVERT]- Count across all units[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]cntu[f][COLOR_REVERT] - Count perunit type[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]cntct[f][COLOR_REVERT] - Count per city[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]cntuct[f][COLOR_REVERT]- Count per unit/city combination[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]cntc[f][COLOR_REVERT] -Count per combat type[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]cntd[f][COLOR_REVERT] - Count per domain[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]tt1[f][x:y][COLOR_REVERT]- Count up to a number chosen between x and y[NEWLINE][ICON_BULLET][COLOR_HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]tt1[f][x][COLOR_REVERT]- Count from x, incrementing each time tt1 code is reset[NEWLINE][NEWLINE]* f in [f] is one of s, A,a, p, g, n, o, r (see help file)
